size.$description: dimension used by the qr component for the code's square box: the 128px QR_code frame (node 16158:27561) binds no size variable and the space scale has no 8rem step, so onmars resolves the nearest step (120px); consumers rescale through this token — the code always stays 1:1 (specs/026-ki-qr/design-extraction.md §4, declared for founder ratification).

color.$description: color used by the qr component for the dark modules and finder rings: the Figma fill binds Text/high_em (#0a0c11), which flips light under the dark scheme and would invert the code, so the theme obligation (FR-010: dark modules on a light tile in both schemes) resolves the scheme-stable black ink instead (design-extraction §2, declared for founder ratification).

background.$description: color used by the qr component for the light tile behind the modules: the Figma symbol is transparent over the showcase card's Surface/s0 white, but a scannable code owns its tile — the scheme-stable white keeps dark-on-light module contrast in both schemes (FR-010, a documented theme obligation).

module-radius.$description: dimension used by the qr component for the corner radius of every data module, in the code's internal coordinate space of 8px per module: Type=square (the set default) renders pure squares (radius 0); the documented round value is {ki.radius.xs} (4px = half a module, the MarsUI Type=round dot carried as a token value, never an attribute — FR-007, 002 shape precedent).

finder-radius.$description: dimension used by the qr component for the corner radius of the three finder rings, applied to the ring's midline in the code's internal coordinate space of 8px per module: Type=square renders square concentric finders (radius 0); the documented round value is {ki.radius.2xl} (14px midline = 18px outer edge, the 2.25-module radius measured on Type=round); the inner-edge and center radii derive by construction (stroke geometry and a 3/7 scale — design-extraction §5).

quiet-zone.$description: dimension used by the qr component for the light quiet zone around the modules: the 8px band measured on both 128px variants (about two modules of the sample matrices), painted as tile padding and preserved at any token-driven size (FR-008).

radius.$description: dimension used by the qr component for the tile corners: the QR_code frames are square with no own radius (the rounded showcase card beneath is framing, not anatomy — design-extraction §1).
